note.zh: 在 Claude Code 2.1.219 中以 Claude Opus 5（Max 思考档位）一次生成，未经修改，耗时 54 分钟。裸 harness 运行：全部 skills、plugins、MCP 与外部设置源均已禁用，工具只保留 Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep。单文件体素幻想世界，Three.js 从 jsdelivr/cdnjs/unpkg 三源依次回退加载。模型全程在同一个文件上迭代重写，并自行写了 check.js、check-html.js、test.js、test-runtime.js 四个校验脚本反复自测。
note.en: One-shot by Claude Opus 5 (Max effort) in Claude Code 2.1.219, unmodified, 54 minutes. Run on a bare harness: all skills, plugins, MCP servers and external setting sources disabled, tools limited to Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep. A single-file voxel fantasy world; Three.js is loaded with a jsdelivr/cdnjs/unpkg fallback chain. The model iterated on one file throughout and wrote four of its own verification scripts (check.js, check-html.js, test.js, test-runtime.js) to test itself repeatedly.
